title: RA 6713, the 'Bible' of public officials
primary_topics: RA 6713 (Code of Ethical Standards for Public Officials)
norms, prohibitions, and penalties for public officials
sub_topics: RA 1379 (Law of Forfeiture of Ill-Gotten Wealth)
norms (public over private interest, justness, no nepotism, no discrimination)
duty to live modest lives appropriate to position and income
prohibited acts (financial interest, private enterprise, private practice, recommendations)

stances.claim: RA 6713 — along with the Constitution, the Anti-Graft Law (RA 3019), and the Forfeiture of Ill-Gotten Wealth Law (RA 1379) — is the 'Bible' of public officials, and 'all these could have been prevented and the crooks penalized by its strict enforcement' by the OMB and CSC.
stances.rhetorical_move: honorific-text framing ('Bible') + indictment of enforcement failure

stances.claim: Public officials must live modest lives appropriate to their position and income — a critical RA 6713 requirement that the current 'billion-peso pork barrel, trillion-peso legislative insertions, and other mind-bending scams' systematically violate.
stances.rhetorical_move: doctrinal restatement + sharp characterization of current scandals

stances.claim: Post-separation cooling-off prohibitions continue for one year after resignation, retirement, or separation — except for private professional practitioners, who nonetheless cannot practice in connection with matters before their former office.

Any RA 6713 violation proven in a proper OMB administrative proceeding shall be sufficient cause for removal or dismissal, 'even if no criminal prosecution is instituted' — administrative and criminal tracks operate independently.

signature_phrases: stupefying billion-peso pork barrel, trillion-peso legislative insertions, and other mind-bending scams
live modest lives appropriate to their positions and income
the crooks penalized by its strict enforcement
register_markers: structured enumeration of duties / prohibitions / penalties (a, b, c, d…)
decision_framework_signals: applies 'Bible of public officials' framing as honorific elevation of legal text
frames enforcement failure (not statutory inadequacy) as the cause of public-sector corruption
uses three-pillar legal-infrastructure framing (Constitution + RA 3019 + RA 1379 + RA 6713) for anti-graft architecture
notable_anecdotes: His mentor Salonga as a sponsor of RA 6713 — alongside Rene Saguisag — approved February 20, 1989
